principle: Make EEAT signals visible on the site — hidden expertise does not count for rankings
explanation: X.seo|eeat_signals: experience == show_firsthand_product_use; expertise == display_credentials + qualifications_on_about_page; authority == earn_links_from_industry_sources + publish_expert_content; trust == visible_business_address + phone + real_team_profiles + SSL + security_badges; NO:expertise_exists_but_invisible_on_site eg: "qualified_doctor_no_bio_no_credentials" >> "doctor_page_with_hospital_affiliation_+_photo_+_publications_+_contact"

principle: Audit site against Google's top ranking factors as a checklist before launch
explanation: X.seo|ranking_audit: check_12_factors: relevant_content + site_traffic + keyword_presence + external_links + core_web_vitals + content_quality + heading_tags_H1-H4 + HTTPS + mobile_friendly + page_speed + local_relevance; competitor_with_more_factors == ranks_higher; NO:ignoring_technical_factors eg: "great_content_but_no_HTTPS_slow_load_no_H1" >> "great_content_+_HTTPS_+_fast_+_proper_H1-H4_structure"

principle: Build responsive design first — Google indexes mobile version as primary ranking signal
explanation: X.seo|mobile_first: google_crawls_mobile_version_first_for_ranking; 70-80%_of_traffic == mobile; responsive_design == same_content + same_structured_data_on_all_devices; NO:desktop_only_site NO:separate_mobile_site_with_less_content eg: "desktop_site_with_rich_content_+_stripped_mobile_version" >> "single_responsive_site_full_content_on_all_breakpoints"
